zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Talbot於1050年出生在艾歐洛諾門迪時，他的父親Sir William de Talbot25歲，母親Basilia de Fleitel27歲。他於1069年與Aimee Adeline Albini在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1086年之後在英國貝德福爾巴特萊斯登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Talbot于1050年出生在艾歐洛諾門迪时，他的父亲Sir William de Talbot25岁，母亲Basilia de Fleitel27岁。他于1069年与Aimee Adeline Albini在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1086年之后在英国貝德福爾巴特萊斯登。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Talbot was born in 1050, in Normandie, Europe, his father, Sir William de Talbot, was 25 and his mother, Basilia de Fleitel, was 27. He married Aimee Adeline Albini in 1069, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died after 1086, in Battlesden, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Talbot est né en 1050, à Normandie, Europe, son père, Sir William de Talbot, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Basilia de Fleitel, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Aimee Adeline Albini en 1069, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé après 1086, à Battlesden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

Lui sposato Aimee Adeline Albini nel 1069, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì dopo il 1086, nel Battlesden, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Talbotが1050年にヨーロッパノーマンディで生まれた時，父Sir William de Talbotは25歳，母Basilia de Fleitelは27歳であった。1069年にイギリスイギリスでAimee Adeline Albiniと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1086年以後にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアバットレスデンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Talbot(이)가 1050년 우럽 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Talbot(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Basilia de Fleitel(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1069년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Aimee Adeline Albini(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1086년 이후 영국 베드퍼드실르 바틀레즈든에서 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Aimee Adeline Albini em 1069, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1086, em Battlesden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Talbot родился в 1050 г. в местности норманди, Европа, его отцу по имени Sir William de Talbot было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Basilia de Fleitel, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Aimee Adeline Albini в 1069 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер после 1086 г. в местности баттлесден, бедфордшир, Англия.
